final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand exposure display ad for the OPPO Find X9 series.

Style/medium: needs high visual impact — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical format optimized for 9:16 aspect ratio
Subject: must include the OPPO Find X9 product as the hero element
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-launch atmosphere — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bold, attention-grabbing atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that emphasizes brand recognition and visual punch — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9" branding
Constraints: must preserve 1080×1920 dimensions, brand exposure priority, visual impact as primary goal
Avoid:
